description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a sloped, reddish-brown tiled roof and light beige stucco exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent arched wooden door at ground level, a small rectangular window above it, and a larger window near the roofline. A set of exterior stairs runs along one side, leading to a secondary entrance on the upper level, which is also marked by a wooden door. The windows are modest in size and asymmetrically placed, contributing to a rustic, Mediterranean feel. The rear and one side of the house are largely unadorned, with minimal openings and a continuous stucco finish. The overall design is functional and compact, suitable for dense urban or village settings.
description: A compact, two-story house with a sloped tiled roof, beige stucco walls, arched wooden doors, and asymmetrical windows. Exterior stairs provide access to the upper level.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main arched entry door, two windows of different sizes, and a visible downspout on the right.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the sloped roof and plain stucco wall, with the exterior staircase partially visible at the back.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly featureless, showing a flat stucco wall and the side of the staircase.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the exterior staircase leading to an upper-level door and two windows, with the sloped roof clearly visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door at ground level with a small overhang, accessed by a short step; secondary entry via exterior staircase to upper level.
